failure_modes.cause: BPR set below required pressure of 24.3 bar
failure_modes.mitigation: Increase BPR setting to at least 24.3 bar

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.mode: Flow restriction due to BPR blockage
failure_modes.cause: Particulate matter or crystallization in BPR
failure_modes.mitigation: Install inline filter before BPR and ensure regular maintenance

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run system at Q=3.49748 mL/min with BPR set to 24.3 bar for 60 min; monitor pressure stability
Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Perform particle size analysis on solvent to ensure no particulates that could block BPR
